mapper.update: UPDATE check_out_record SET status = '4' WHERE check_out_record_id = #{id} AND status = '2' AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_out_record c LEFT JOIN customer u ON c.customer_id = u.customer_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.del_flag = '0'
AND u.customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%')
